---
title: "fase_1_ditetiske_afvigelser"
subtitle: "`fase_1_ditetiske_afvigelser`"
description: "fase_1_ditetiske_afvigelser"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/fase_1_ditetiske_afvigelser/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                    | Title                                 | Type   | Description                                                                                                                   |
|-----------------------------------------|---------------------------------------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                 | The unique name of the event          | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                            |
| `center`                                | Research center                       | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                         |
| `date_registration_dietary_deviation_1` | date_registration_dietary_deviation_1 | date   | Date for when the deviation is registered during phase 1. Dietary deviations phase 1. Repeated instrument.                    |
| `staff_initials_dietary_deviation_1`    | staff_initials_dietary_deviation_1    | string | Initials of the study staff member responsible for registration of the dietary deviation during phase 1. Repeated instrument. |
| `date_dietary_deviation_1`              | date_dietary_deviation_1              | date   | Start date for possible planed deviation from VLCD dietary recommendations. Phase 1. Repeated instrument.                     |
| `dateend_dietary_deviation_1`           | dateend_dietary_deviation_1           | date   | End date for possible planed deviation from VLCD dietary recommendations. Phase 1. Repeated instrument.                       |
| `reason_dietary_deviation_1`            | reason_dietary_deviation_1            | string | Reason for deviation. Phase 1. Repeated instrument.                                                                           |
| `reasonother_dietary_deviation_1`       | reasonother_dietary_deviation_1       | string | If reason is Other give a description. Phase 1. Repeated instrument.                                                          |
| `upload_dietary_deviation_1`            | upload_dietary_deviation_1            | string | Document with plan for planned deviation during VLCD. Phase 1. Repeated instrument.                                           |
| `comment_dietary_deviation_1`           | comment_dietary_deviation_1           | string | Any comments on the deviation. Phase 1. Repeated instrument.                                                                  |

: Fields in the `fase_1_ditetiske_afvigelser` resource.
